name: Arjun Kumar
notes: Prefers premium wooden houseboats in Nigeen Lake rather than crowded Dal Lake. Enjoys mild saffron Kahwa tea and requested certified tourist guides for Gulmarg Gondola Phase 2.

name: Fatimah Al-Mansoor
notes: International guest from Dubai, UAE. Requires custom luxury private 4x4 SUV charters. Strictly vegetarian organic meals during Pahalgam stays.
